// WARN: This file is automatically generated. Any work done here, and not
use crate::lang::{
    lib::ui::ui_types::emphasis::emphasis_model::Emphasis,
    runtime::{state::conundrum_error_variant::ConundrumModalResult, traits::conundrum_input::ConundrumInput},
};

use winnow::{Parser, combinator::alt, token::literal};

pub fn emphasis_css_variable(input: &mut ConundrumInput) -> ConundrumModalResult<Emphasis> {
     alt(( {% for emph in Emphasis::iter() %} {% let emph_group = emph.to_css_variable_group() %}
literal("{{emph_group.background}}").value(Emphasis::{{emph | title}}),
literal("{{emph_group.foreground}}").value(Emphasis::{{emph | title}}), {% endfor %}
    )).parse_next(input)
}

pub fn css_variable_to_emphasis(variable: &str) -> Option<Emphasis> {
      match variable { {% for emph in Emphasis::iter() %}
        "{{emph.to_css_variable_group().background}}" => Some(Emphasis::{{emph | title}}),
        "{{emph.to_css_variable_group().foreground}}" => Some(Emphasis::{{emph | title}}), {% endfor %} 
        _ => None
       }
}
